response.justification: Candidate has strong full-stack and systems experience across many languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, some Java), but the role requires deep JVM expertise with Java/Kotlin, Spring ecosystem, and genuine interest in IDE internals. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration tooling) and Kotlin/Spring are entirely absent. The closest IDE work was C/C++ on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. The profile doesn't match the enterprise JVM tooling focus.
strengths: Prior IDE/tooling experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI in C/C++)
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, workshops
Experience with complex systems, low-latency services, and large-scale codebases
concerns: No demonstrable Kotlin experience and only peripheral Java exposure
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
Recent work centers on TypeScript/Node and DLang, not the JVM ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Lack of Kotlin and Spring ecosystem experience
